CORRECTION FOR TIME. THE ROAD REMAINS FLOODED AS OF 9:30AM. PHOTO SHARED VIA SOCIAL MEDIA SHOWS FLASH FLOODING OF ST. MARYS BROOK ROAD AT VIOLETTE BROOK. ROAD IS COMPLETELY IMPASSABLE.

DELAYED REPORT FROM JULY 14TH. MAINE FOREST SERVICE SHARED PHOTOS VIA SOCIAL MEDIA OF TREE DAMAGE. 20-30 TREES WERE SNAPPED OR UPROOTED. MOSTLY SOFTWOOD BUT A FEW HARDWOOD TREES. TREES MOSTLY 8-15 INCHES DIAMETER. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

EXTENSIVE TREE DAMAGE ALONG THE CORNER RD IN BRIDGEWATER. THE ROAD REMAINED CLOSED AS OF EARLY WEDNESDAY MORNING AS CREWS CONTINUE TO CLEAR FALLEN TREES AND DEBRIS.
